UI_trait_tinkererdesc:
Faster and better tinkering.
+20% chance to not consume items when tinkering.
UI_trait_reforger_desc:
Faster and better reforging.
+20% chance to not consume items when reforging.
UI_trait_loodoman_desc:
Unlocks tinkering ability.
+20% chance to not consume items when reforging.
3x reforging speed (6x when combined with Reforger).
+7.77% chance of legendary modifier when reforging.
77.77% chance the reforged item will be of bad quality.
